chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1219 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.4573/2022 3. For hearing of main case 07-11-2023 M/s Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro and Abdul Sattar Mahesar, Advocates for the Petitioner Mr. Niaz Husain Maitlo, Advocate for Respondents No.2 to 4 Mrs. Rizwana Memon, Advocate for Respondent No.5 Mr. Sundar Khan Chachar, Advocate for Respondent No.10 Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This petition after hearing is disposed of with consent in terms of which learned counsel for respondents No.2 to 4 undertakes that within two months two posts of Assistant Professor Pakistan Studies in Shah Abdul Latif University Khairpur, which are lying vacant would be advertised and petitioner may apply for the same post and would be considered on his merits in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
